captions.notes: Facebook and LinkedIn contain one conditional, agronomist-led Frost-Ex mention. Instagram and X remain product-neutral. No timing, rate, ingredient, packaging claim, product hashtag or product link.

correction: Removed the visible ILLUSTRATIVE - NOT TO SCALE label from the top-right of the Slide 4 timeline image. No other Slide 4 content changed.
status: Concept 5 selected for upload packaging. Assets are prepared; content is not approved or published.
publication_gates: Agronomic approval of physiology and efficacy claims
risk_controls: Nutrition may support readiness but does not replace active physical frost protection.
Never infer directions from a mockup or archived product page.
The Slide 4 Frost-Ex 20 litre pack is a concept visual only, not proof of current packaging.
The paired young-leaf and old-leaf DSA graphic is an illustrative interpretation framework only; it shows no customer values, sufficiency bands or simulated results.
